title: Plan: Rebrand + Multi-Client Theming
summary: Intent and architecture plan for rebranding the PLG Readiness Diagnostic to Overdrive defaults with a swappable per-client theme layer in single-file index.html.
notes: Hybrid shape: PRD-style structure (Why/Goal/Scope/Out-of-scope/Open-questions) with an embedded '## Locked decisions' section containing ~6 settled constraints (single-file no build, no dark backgrounds, CSS-variable theme contract, Tailwind tokens, structure/skin separation, theming-visual-only). Not an ADR (no single Decision + Consequences pair; multiple distinct decisions bundled). Synthesizer should treat the 'Locked decisions' bullets as hard constraints despite type=PRD. Document self-describes as 'lightweight intent + architecture doc' for GSD ingest.
